message.content:
@startuml
title SignUp Flow

actor Client
participant "Mobile" as Mobile
box "" #LightBlue [SMS Gateway] end box
box "" #LightGray [Push Gateway] end box
box "" #WhiteSmoke [DigitalDB] end box
rectangle Keycloak + Extension { } 

Client ->> Mobile : 1 Enter PhoneNumber, Birthday\n2 Enter Password 
activate Mobile  
    Mobile->>+Keycloak+Extension:3 POST /auth/signup (PhoneNumber,Birthday)   
        activate DigitalDb    
            Keycloak+Extension-->-DigitalDb:4 findClientRecord(PhoneNumber,Birthdate):ClientRecord     
                alt "[Client Record NOT found]"        
                    return HTTP_202         
                else            
                   saveInOTPContext(ClientId.id); generateAndSaveOtp(): Otp; sendSms(phone=phoneNumber,data=oTP).          
                       SMS_Gateway<<--mobile:"sms_with_oTp"; get_push_token(); push_gateway.getpushToken().return(push_Token);generate_keys([public_key,private_Key]).enter_OtP.post_/Auth/Signup_Complete(OtP,password,push-Token,PUBLIC_KEY.validate_OTp.update_user(client_id,key_cloak_userid.create_mobile_device(CLIENT_ID_PUSH_TOKEN_PUBLICKEY.generate_jwt(scope="regular-user"):JWT.http_response({jwt:jwT}).end_alt.deactivate_all.end_title_sign_up_flow.@enduml
